creator: dl@tyfon.net
text:
On Tue, 11 Sep 2001, Dan Larsson wrote:

| ftp.freesoftware.com is also listed as the XFree master
| site:
|
| % egrep '\$FreeBSD|freesoftware' defaults/make.conf
| # $FreeBSD: src/etc/defaults/make.conf,v 1.97.2.53 2001/07/09 13:49:54 ru Exp $
| #MASTER_SITE_XFREE=     ftp://ftp.freesoftware.com/pub/XFree86/%SUBDIR%/source/

Oops my bad, it's apparently moved from XFREE to SOURCEWARE in the latest
(for RELENG_4) defaults/make.conf file:

egrep '\$FreeBSD|freesoftware' defaults/make.conf
# $FreeBSD: src/etc/defaults/make.conf,v 1.97.2.58 2001/08/23 20:08:51 knu Exp $
#MASTER_SITE_SOURCEWARE=	ftp://ftp.freesoftware.com/pub/sourceware/%SUBDIR%/


Regards
+------
Dan Larsson  -+- Tyfon Svenska AB -+-  DL1999-RIPE
2AA5 90AE 5185 5924 1E0B  1A99 EC8A EA84 406B 06B9
